parameters.jsonBody: ={'alert_name': $node["Parse Alert Data"].json.alert_name, 'service_name': $node["Parse Alert Data"].json.service_name, 'severity': $node["Parse Alert Data"].json.severity, 'trace_id': $node["Parse Alert Data"].json.trace_id}

={'model': 'mistral', 'prompt': 'Alert: ' + $node["Parse Alert Data"].json.alert_name + '
Service: ' + $node["Parse Alert Data"].json.service_name + '
Severity: ' + $node["Parse Alert Data"].json.severity + '

Provide: 1) Root cause, 2) Impact, 3) Recommended action', 'stream': false}
={'status': 'processing', 'ticket_data': $node['⚡ Autonomous Decision Logic'].json.ticket_data, 'decision': $node['⚡ Autonomous Decision Logic'].json.decision}

parameters.responseBody: ={'status': 'orchestration_complete', 'trace_id': $node['Parse Alert Data'].json.trace_id, 'message': 'Autonomous workflow executed successfully', 'ticket': $node['🎫 Create Ticket in xyOps'].json}
